meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Test Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Bridge the trust gap with automated testing. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build a robust, enterprise-grade portfolio and ship faster.
content.answer_block: You are losing deals because your lack of a portfolio signals technical risk. Solve this by implementing automated testing suites that prove code reliability. By integrating Antigravity and Claude Code, you can turn your MVP into a production-ready asset, demonstrating to stakeholders that your product is built for scale.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that nobody cares about your vision if your infrastructure is brittle. Founders often find themselves trapped in a 'no portfolio' purgatory, unable to demonstrate the stability required for enterprise contracts or investor buy-in. You aren't just selling code; you are selling the assurance that your system won't collapse under pressure.

Testing automation is the ultimate shortcut to credibility. It transforms your codebase from a liability into a verifiable asset. By leveraging AI-driven workflows, you can retroactively build a testing suite that proves your product’s maturity, effectively replacing a years-long portfolio with a singular, high-integrity demonstration of engineering excellence.

steps.title: Establish the Testing Baseline
steps.description: Identify your core business logic—the mission-critical paths that generate revenue. We will generate unit tests for these first to ensure the backbone of your SaaS is untouchable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the repository for core business logic paths and generate a comprehensive PyTest suite that hits 80% branch coverage on all payment and authentication modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate unit tests for /src/auth and /src/payments' --framework pytest

steps.title: Automate Integration Workflows
steps.description: Move beyond unit tests. We need to prove that your services talk to each other correctly. This step builds the bridge between your API and your database layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test suite that simulates user registration through checkout, verifying database state changes at each step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create integration tests for user-to-checkout flow' --verify-db

steps.title: Implement Regression Guardrails
steps.description: Every time you push code, you risk breaking your existing features. We automate regression testing so you never deploy a 'hotfix' that destroys your revenue stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a regression suite that runs on every commit, specifically targeting edge cases in the data processing pipeline.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Setup regression suite for data processing pipeline' --ci-config

steps.title: Load Testing for Scale
steps.description: Investors love to ask 'what happens if you get 10,000 users?' Prove your scalability by automating load tests that simulate high-traffic scenarios.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a load testing script using Locust that simulates 500 concurrent users performing search queries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate locust load test for search endpoint' --concurrency 500

steps.title: Generate the 'Trust Dashboard'
steps.description: Visualize your quality. We will compile these tests into a report that you can show potential clients or investors to prove your technical competence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize all test results into a JSON report and generate a README section titled 'Engineering Quality' showcasing the current test coverage percentage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Compile test results to README.md' --format summary

pro_tips: Treat your test suite as a product feature; if a test is flaky, delete it, because a broken test is worse than no test.
Use test-driven development to write your 'demo' features, ensuring your portfolio pieces are flawless from the first commit.
Integrate your test reports directly into your sales deck to provide tangible proof of your SaaS stability to non-technical stakeholders.
Automate your documentation alongside your tests; if the code changes, the documentation must update via AI hooks.
Focus on 'happy path' testing first for the portfolio, but prioritize 'failure mode' testing for actual production stability.
content.next_steps: Once your testing suite is live, integrate these results into your public GitHub repository as a featured project. Use the automated report generated in Step 5 to create a 'Trust Score' badge on your landing page.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to build a product that commands respect. Stop hiding your technical prowess and start proving it with every automated deployment. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
